data.body: TS1 (c96d) CODE DONE. Plan re-scoped to authorship.py-only (in-toto Statement machinery as NEW fns: authorship_content_hash, build_authorship_statement, sign_event_authorship, verify_event_authorship; low-level sign_authorship/verify_authorship primitive PRESERVED for KEY-ops). Plan-review PASS+signed, claimed. Held-out TDD: 2 happy + 9 held-out (cross-identity/tamper-body/tamper-sig/subject-name-clause/malformed-statement/unknown-id/content_hash-contract x2/primitive-preserved); RED confirmed (AttributeError on absent fns); implementer (held out from oracle) satisfied all 11 blind; teeth confirmed (dropped content_hash check -> tamper-body RED). Consumer cutover (_seam stamping, verify_authorship.py content-binding, compact ledger) + create_placeholder RELOCATED to TS3 (those symbols live in commit 7/3183, not commit 3/bde5). GIT SURGERY: folded into bde5 commit -> bde5''=2c4fa1c6 (change 561, Change-Id I0c7c3be0 preserved, rebar-ticket->c96d); rebased e165/264f/2f13/3183/4b5b onto it (clean, no conflicts). Fixed test-scoping bug: primitive-preserved test used e165's keyop_payload (absent at commit 3) -> switched to raw bytes. bde5'' green IN ISOLATION (13 passed) + TS1 green at HEAD (11). Stack stays green (TS1 additive, cutover deferred to TS3). NOT pushed yet - will push whole corrected stack after TS2/3/4. NEXT: TS2 (09f9 key-validity->git-commit-ancestry, hardest).
